# CVPixelFormatDescription.PlaneConfiguration

**Enumeration**

Defines how color components in the buffer are arranged.

## Declaration

```swift
enum PlaneConfiguration
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **CVPixelFormatDescription.PlaneConfiguration.nonPlanar(_:)**
- **CVPixelFormatDescription.PlaneConfiguration.planar(_:)**

## Conforms To

- Equatable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
